title: Optimal Aim
description: Optimal aim renders a cube on other entities to aid in aiming and best utilizing your reach. Aimed towards pvp.
body:
# **Optimal Aim mod**

This mod helps you position your crosshair on other players for pvp purposes to help utilize your full 3 block reach by rendering a small, highly configurable cube on the best place to aim.

I made this mod because I see many new players aiming their crosshair at the other player's legs, losing a good 0.1-0.2 blocks of reach, when the closest point of the hitbox is usually the head.

Also if you set the max distance to '3', the cube will only render when you're able to attack the entity, useful for learning spacing and getting an idea for your own reach!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/97d97jrjmIU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(More previews are in the gallery, and don't forget to check out [Tektonikal](https://modrinth.com/user/Tektonikal))

## Dependencies

This mod requires [Fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Cloth config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration.
